title: JSA elevates 20 to Retained Partner, 7 Women among them
description: JSA Advocates and Solicitors has announced the elevation of 20 attorneys to Retained Partners, which includes 7 women Retained Partners.The following lawyers have been made Retained Partner:Aditya Dayal | Corporate | GurugramAditya Gupta | Disputes | DelhiAngad Baxi | Disputes | DelhiAnkita Jain | Corporate | GurugramGayatri Aryan | Disputes | DelhiHarshit Dusad | Finance | GurugramHimanshu Vij | Disputes | DelhiKairav Parikh | Finance | MumbaiMaitreyi Kannur | Disputes | BengaluruMalcolm D. Des
